sections.heading: Household Overview
paragraphs: This wider DOCX fixture keeps the maintained claim inside heading-based sections, longer prose blocks, simple bullet lists, and straightforward tables so the lane is measured on more than one narrow content arrangement.
bullets: Primary household: Ada, Lin, and June
Review status: ready for maintained-lane proof

sections.heading: Archive Notes
paragraphs: A second section confirms that the DOCX lane still preserves prose after a table and that block-level provenance remains stable across a different narrative shape than the original mini fixture.
The maintained claim here is intentionally modest: repeated section headings, longer paragraphs, simple list items, and reviewable table HTML without invented page numbers.

sections.heading: Processing Checks
paragraphs: The final section adds a second simple table so the widened proof checks that table handling is not a one-off property of the original fixture.
bullets: Manifest should list three chapter entries.
Provenance rows should keep non-empty source element ids.
